message.locked: The Minecart system is currently closed due to schedule.
message.insufficient_funds: You don't have enough gold for the trip. (Cost: {0}g)
config.enabled.name: Mod Enabled
config.enabled.tooltip: Turn the mod on or off.
config.unlock_early.name: Unlock All Minecarts
config.unlock_early.tooltip: If true, you can use minecarts immediately without completing the Boiler Room bundles.
config.adaptive.name: Adaptive Mode
config.adaptive.tooltip:
If true, minecarts open/close based on the schedule below.
If false, minecarts are always open.
config.travel_cost.name: Travel Cost
config.travel_cost.tooltip: Amount of gold required to use the minecart. Set to 0 for free travel.
config.schedule.note: Uncheck a box to close the minecarts during that time.
